case_title: AAA RESTAURANT FIRE CONTROL INC. VS ACEVEDO JESUS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY AAA RESTAURANT FIRE CONTROL INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ACEVEDO JESUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ACEVEDO JESUS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AAA RESTAURANT FIRE CONTROL INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACEVEDO JESUS $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ACEVEDO JESUS
